title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1551 - Proceeding by minor parent
text:
454.1551.  Proceeding by minor parent. — A minor parent, or a guardian or other legal representative of a minor parent, may maintain a proceeding on behalf of or for the benefit of the minor's child.
(L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
Effective 6-15-16, see § 454.1728
